qas.q: The classification system includes protection of collateral information and SCI. Which of the following best identifies SCI?
qas.a: SCI can be classified at any level but must be protected according to SCI requirements.

qas.q:
Match the letter associated with each classification level to the correct degree.
(A) Top Secret
(B) Secret
(C) Confidential
qas.a:
(A) Exceptionally grave damage
(B) Serious Damage
(C) Damage
____ Little to no damage

qas.q: Several important elements are required in order for an individual to gain authorized access to classified information. These include having a valid security clearance and a signed SF312, Classified Information Nondisclosure Agreement. Which of the following elements is also required?

My recent Government credit card bill shows I made a car payment and bought a tank of gas for my car. Even though I have paid the bill in full, I know using a Government credit card for personal use is against Government policy.

Which adjudicative guideline best addresses this scenario?

I've been playing an online game lately, which has allowed me to meet many people from around the world. I quickly became friends with a citizen of Yemen. We play together constantly, and he seems to be genuinely interested in what I do. After I told him I am a Soldier in the U.S. Army, he became excited. We are constantly e-mailing and chatting now. He has even planned a vacation to the U.S. and will be staying with me. I can't wait to show him the post and everything we do here.

While on vacation in another state, I had too many drinks and got pulled over. I was arrested and charged with driving under the influence of alcohol. I intend to get a good lawyer and have the charges reduced so I don't have such a serious charge on my record. I guess you could say the "jury is still out" on this one, literally.

I keep my network passwords written in a notebook so I don't forget them. I went to the gym to play basketball with some friends and locked the notebook inside a locker. When I returned, I discovered the locker had been pried open and all of my belongings, including the notebook, were missing. Since someone stole the notebook, it can't be my fault. Does this situation require self-reporting?

I've been an intelligence analyst for the past 10 years. I also work part-time as a contributor and editor of the American section of a renowned foreign publication on the world's latest armored track vehicles. I took three aerial surveillance photographs showing construction of a foreign government's prototype tank from a coworker's desk. I sent these photographs to the publication because I believe the American public will help increase the U.S. defense budget if they know what we are really up against. Does this situation require self-reporting?

I was at a party with all of my civilian friends and alcohol was present. Things got a little out of hand, and the cops were called. It turns out I was the only person there of legal age, and I was charged with contributing to the delinquency of a minor. It's just a misdemeanor, and I was off duty. Does this situation require self-reporting?

I was recently stationed in Korea and met a wonderful girl who is a citizen there. We have been seeing each other for a while and plan to get married soon. I don't want to tell anyone I work with; who I marry is none of their business. Does this situation require self-reporting?

I'm getting ready to retire, and I want to write a book on my experiences while working for the Army. I've participated in many highly classified briefings that were very interesting to say the least. Does this situation require self-reporting?

True or False
LTC Rowe tells you he is interested in seeing a classified image you are analyzing. Even though viewing these images is not part of his duties, he has clearance, so you can give the image to LTC Rowe. Given his rank, it is safe to assume he has the authorization.

True or False
When you are working on a classified project and trying to meet a deadline, you can email the project to your personal account and work on it from home as long as you use a password and no one else accesses it.

True or False
When you are working with a classified document, you must ensure it has the cover sheet for its classification level while outside of a GSA-approved safe.
Security incidents are categorized as either infractions or violations. Which of the following best defines a violation?
qas.a: An incident that indicated knowing, willful, and negligent disregard for security regulations, and results in, or could be expected to result in, the loss or compromise of classified information.

qas.q: What concept or principle requires layered, complementary controls sufficient to detect or deter infiltration and exploitation of an organization, its information systems, and its facilities?

It is your responsibility to help protect personnel and prevent unauthorized access to facilities, equipment, material, and documents by reporting potential security concerns. Which of the following activities would require reporting?
qas.a: Allowing a co-worker to follow you into a controlled room without personally carding in.
